sections.title: Going To — Introduction and Formula
sections.explanation: Going To is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Subject + am/is/are + going to + base verb (planned future action). Rules: 'Going to' expresses a planned or intended future action | Formula: am/is/are + going to + base verb | Negative: am/is/are not going to | Different from 'will' — 'going to' shows a plan already made
sections.formula: Subject + am/is/are + going to + base verb (planned future action)

examples.hindi: मैं कल यह काम करने जा रहा हूँ।
examples.english: I am going to do this work tomorrow.

examples.hindi: वह डॉक्टर बनने जा रही है।
examples.english: She is going to become a doctor.

examples.hindi: हम अगले महीने घर बदलने जा रहे हैं।
examples.english: We are going to change our house next month.

examples.hindi: वे शादी करने जा रहे हैं।
examples.english: They are going to get married.

examples.hindi: क्या तुम आज बाहर जाने वाले हो?
examples.english: Are you going to go out today?

examples.hindi: मैं यह किताब खरीदने जा रहा हूँ।
examples.english: I am going to buy this book.

sections.title: Going To — Daily Life Usage
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Going To for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Subject + am/is/are + going to + base verb (planned future action)

examples.hindi: वह अगले हफ्ते यात्रा करने जा रहा है।
examples.english: He is going to travel next week.

examples.hindi: हम एक नया business शुरू करने जा रहे हैं।
examples.english: We are going to start a new business.

examples.hindi: मैं इस बारे में सोचने जा रहा हूँ।
examples.english: I am going to think about this.

examples.hindi: वह यह project पूरा करने जा रही है।
examples.english: She is going to finish this project.

examples.hindi: क्या वे कल आने वाले हैं?
examples.english: Are they going to come tomorrow?

examples.hindi: मैं आज रात जल्दी सोने जा रहा हूँ।
examples.english: I am going to sleep early tonight.

sections.title: Going To — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Going To — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Going To in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Subject + am/is/are + going to + base verb (planned future action)

examples.hindi: वह इंटरव्यू देने जा रहा है।
examples.english: He is going to give an interview.

examples.hindi: हम कल मूवी देखने जा रहे हैं।
examples.english: We are going to watch a movie tomorrow.

examples.hindi: मैं यह गलती नहीं दोहराने जा रहा।
examples.english: I am not going to repeat this mistake.

examples.hindi: वह अपना खुद का घर खरीदने जा रही है।
examples.english: She is going to buy her own house.

sections.title: Going To — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Going To — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Going To. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Subject + am/is/are + going to + base verb (planned future action)

examples.hindi: क्या तुम यह मौका लेने वाले हो?
examples.english: Are you going to take this opportunity?

examples.hindi: हम इस समस्या को हल करने जा रहे हैं।
examples.english: We are going to solve this problem.

examples.hindi: वे नई नौकरी ढूंढने जा रहे हैं।
examples.english: They are going to look for a new job.

examples.hindi: मैं यह बात उसे बताने जा रहा हूँ।
examples.english: I am going to tell him this.
